overview.description: The Invesco BulletShares 2033 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (BSJX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated, high yield corporate bonds with effective maturities in 2033. BSJX was launched on Jun 11, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.
